source.title: Opinion: The best education for future success might surprise you

verified_claims: Software engineering job postings declined since 2022 peak
Entry-level developer roles are disappearing due to AI tools
Teachers and HR leaders value soft skills and critical thinking
Stanford launched humanistic AI programs in 2024
MIT integrated ethics+science as required courses
Google and OpenAI hiring for ethics and philosophy backgrounds
Global shift from STEM-only to interdisciplinary approach
issues: Stanford CS enrollment decline specifically attributed to AI (reasonable inference but not universally attributed)
fact_check.methodology: Cross-referenced with Stanford University announcements, MIT curriculum changes, Deloitte Higher Education Trends 2026, and major tech company hiring practices.

draft.headline: AI 시대의 '역설': 기술 도구는 언제든 배울 수 있다, 하지만 인간 판단력은 아니다
draft.subheadline: 기술 기술이 아닌 '인문학'이 AI 시대에 살아남는 이유, 자유교육의 재평가
